screen.notes: FINDING: No wireframe; service/agent/cron status. Operator-gated; testable: unauthenticated.

claim_rows.claim: All 10 /admin/* routes are gated server-side on isAdmin: unauthenticated requests get 401, non-admin authenticated requests get 403 -- never client-side-only trust
claim_rows.method: curl each /admin/* endpoint with no auth (expect 401) and with a non-admin authenticated session (expect 403)

baseline_note: Baseline captures from Step 6 are under uat/reports/evidence/manual-verification/screens/ (folder named admin-health or admin-health_auth/admin-health_unauth or baseline/admin-health depending on sweep layout) — use as the 'before' record.
